data.body: BLOCKED on keystone e4df-43bc-ec00-40e5 (op-cert storage/producer primitive). Discovered during implementation: verifying a required-environment op-cert over the merged log requires op-certs to be STORED on tickets (a DSSE envelope in the attestation record), which needs a reducer change + a producer — core event-sourcing machinery shared with ee0b/8f1d, under-specified in the decomposition. Plan-review PASSED (certified, vs HEAD) and the story is fully specified; it is executable once the keystone lands. Recommend confirming the storage-model decision (Option A: extend SIGNATURE record — recommended; vs Option B: new OPCERT event type) before building, given reducer blast radius.
